handoff_sequence.responsibility: Own runtime preflight, source-of-truth check, and stop conditions before any diagnosis run starts.
Perform only the bounded diagnosis and evidence collection steps named by the architect.
Close blocker review, verify artifact completeness, and name rollback or re-entry posture.
Run the mapped tool-trajectory and verification-honesty evals without widening scope.
Prepare episode, state_capsule, and decision writeback plus rerun-ready provenance continuity.
